feedback.text: Dear Digital Fairness term, Thanks for your work that makes Europe's future safer. As there are some discrepancies between the expectations of the industry versus the guarantees of precautionary principle by the regulator, a solution was found to satisfy both the regulators mandate to reassure the safety of European citizens and the industry's need not to throttle the development of their computational reasoners. The solution is the proposal of Hardware-Implemented AGI Safety Systems with Virtue-Calibrated Fractal Containment and Quantum Aligned Normative Compliance Matrix, (patent pending). It encodes ethics and virtue of the core level - within the hardware. It allows the machine to progress in its development of if moral imperatives are maintained. These imperatives are operationalized virtues formulated by Bentham, Kant and Confucius. The system provides for secured certification. I am open to further discussion. Best regards, Fandom Solis Prague +420 733655755 www.dubito-ergo.com
